title: Key Concepts from S. Sridhar's 'Machine Learning' Textbook
description: A hierarchical mind map visualizing the core topics and foundational concepts typically covered in a foundational Machine Learning textbook.
relationships: Mathematical Foundations underpins all Core Learning Paradigms
Core Learning Paradigms branches into Supervised, Unsupervised, and Reinforcement Learning
Model Evaluation & Tuning is a process applied to models from all paradigms
Advanced Topics build upon the Core Learning Paradigms
